channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: David Bowie archive to go on UK tour with rare unseen collection
item.description:
The V&A Museum will take its David Bowie archive on a UK-wide tour, showcasing more than 100 rare and previously unseen objects that celebrate the legendary artist’s extraordinary impact on music, fashion, film, and popular culture.

Key points:
• Over 100 rare David Bowie archive items will tour the UK for the first time.
• The exhibition includes unseen costumes, handwritten notes, instruments, and photographs.
• The tour begins in Dundee before visiting other cultural venues across the UK.
• The exhibition highlights Bowie’s enduring creative legacy and influence on generations of artists.

Read the full article: David Bowie archive to go on UK tour with rare unseen collection
